subcodes.first_line: How large of a stipend and expenditure does the Sadr A`zam allot you every month…  What are you busying yourself with, Kalim?
subcodes.first_line_orig: آیا صدر اعظم هر ماهی چقدر شهریه و مخارج برای شما معین کرده
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in Baghdad, @occult sciences; psychic phenomena, @alchemy; the elixir
